2239190.name: The Klown
2239190.description:
The Klown is The Dark Fantasy Graphic Adventure. You help him to find the Mystery Circus and discover the secrets fields of Fantastic.

Can you find The Klown on this mysterious and magical Journey to the Final Destination?

Rush through the Space before the Time runs out.

This game is based upon the modern 80,s tale written by Gilles Villeneuve, The Klown.

Key Features

  • For fans of 2D Open World Slow Burn.

  • Maze Runner like game, explore, find and talk to secret Characters to access secret Areas.

  • Multiple endings, cinematic, story driven and non linear.

  • Secret 22 characters and 22 areas to find.

  • Short game, about 2 hours.

  • Not an Action Combat, but Puzzle Exploration focused.

  • Amazing graphics and sound.

The Klown is a 2D Open World game inspired on the very good DOS Era genre titles.

Talk, Run, Explore. Find secret passages and characters and discover a Dark Fantasy World full of secrets.

The Klown is a modern Maze Runner Adventure.

Can you find The Klown before your Time runs out?
2239190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
